notes: W5.4 regression check. Fresh CDP Page.navigate to https://chat.deepseek.com/ followed by a cache-bypass hard reload (Page.reload ignoreCache=true) with hydration waits (nav 6s, reload 8s). After the hard reload location.href = https://chat.deepseek.com/sign_in — the session is logged out, so the chat root redirects to the DeepSeek sign-in page (전화번호/이메일 + 비밀번호 + 로그인, Google/Apple SSO). No chat composer behind the login wall, so the PII prompt could NOT be typed or submitted (submitted=false); no engine WS round-trip began, no '차단' warning surfaced (warning_rendered=false). Screenshot 01_deepseek_sign_in.png confirms the chat.deepseek.com/sign_in login form. This MATCHES the deepseek baseline FAIL_AUTH (session expired). Per request notes, deepseek is in the auth-fragile/batch-last group where FAIL_AUTH = engine 미실행, NOT a regression: the engine is never exercised (engine_intercept_fired=no, page NOT replaced, parent_candidate_id empty-case never reached), so the W5.4 character-add-turn migration to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope (ws_json id=31) cannot be evaluated here. deepseek is NOT the W5.4 key validator (character is). Non-discriminating indicator; outcome identical class to prior deepseek auth-fragile baselines. A re-login would be required to exercise the engine path on deepseek.
